candidate_definition_hints.text: Lower-latency OpenMP-style minimalistic scoped thread-pool designed for 'Fork-Join' parallelism in Rust and C++, avoiding memory allocations, mutexes, CAS-primitives, and false-sharing on the hot path 🍴

Fork Union is arguably the lowest-latency OpenMP-style NUMA-aware minimalistic scoped thread-pool designed for 'Fork-Join' parallelism in C++, C, and Rust, avoiding × [mutexes & system calls](#locks-and-mutexes), × [dynamic memory allocations](#memory-allocations), × [CAS-primit…
